_comment: Offline failure-context sidecar for the backoff fixture. During offline replay `gh` is unavailable, so run.sh exposes this at $FIX_CONTEXT_FILE and the /fix skill reads it as the fallback for what it would otherwise self-fetch (group label + renovate-upgrades JSON + failing checks). Mirrors the shape of the real PR #822.
renovate_notes: MAJOR VERSION UPDATE - please manually update this package
